__fixture__.name: enterprise_failover_boundary_recheck
__fixture__.scenario: Enterprise-online deployment where a future managed failover or tenant migration restored service only by changing region and tenant assumptions. Local editing, save, export, diagnostics, and Git continue; remote and privileged replay hold pending an explicit boundary recheck. Every service reports boundary_recheck_required until the new posture is confirmed.

title: Enterprise failover with explicit region and tenant boundary recheck
scenario_summary: Enterprise-online deployment where a failover or migration restored service only by changing the region and tenant posture; local editing, save, export, and diagnostics continue and replay of privileged queued actions holds until the user or admin confirms the new region, tenant, and key posture.

control_plane_state_by_service_class.note: Sync paused until the new region and tenant posture is confirmed.
Tenant scope changed; session step-up is deferred until recheck completes.
Docs service is regionally mirrored and is not part of the boundary change.

data_plane_state_by_capability_class.note: Privileged tasks are paused until the new region and tenant posture is confirmed.

retained_local_safe_capabilities: continue local edits and review cached context
compare prior versus current boundary metadata
pause or discard privileged replay intentionally
blocked_managed_only_capabilities: replay queued privileged actions under prior approvals
resume collaboration or remote control under stale tenant scope
assume previous region or key-mode claims remain valid

freshness_posture.staleness_rationale: Region and tenant posture changed under failover; prior freshness windows no longer apply until the recheck completes.
